statusReason: Inventory probe showed canonical /qa-seed-data b2b profile (which creates fresh AGENT-TEST-Org-{date} entities) does NOT fix the actual breakage. The dead entities are NAMED references that .env + suites pin to. A canonical seed would create new GUIDs, consume budget, and leave b2c suites still blocked. Per brief 'If a Postman request fails, STOP — report and let user decide', equivalent here is: stop before seeding when the seed contract does not match the recovery scope.

contacts.note: All 13 seeded contacts (incl. John Mitchell, Sarah Chen, Mike Torres, Lisa Wang, Hans Mueller) are alive as Contact records BUT 5 ex-AcmeCorp contacts are now orphaned (organizations[] empty or stripped). They will fail any test that asserts org membership until re-linked.

users.passwordPolicy: Per test-data/b2b/users.csv — seeded users use TestPass123!, filler users use Password1!. Per memory/feedback_agents_read_env_creds: agents must read passwords from .env or CSV at runtime, never hardcode.

addresses.note: Addresses are embedded on Contact records (still present on alive contacts). No separate REST probe needed.

organizations.name: AGENT-TEST-Org-AcmeCorp-20260310
organizations.evidence: GET /api/members/{id} → HTTP 200 with empty body; /api/members/search keyword=AGENT-TEST does not return it
organizations.cause: Likely cascade-deleted during 2026-05-15 catalog wipe (see memory/project_vcstqa_restore_2026_05_15)

organizations.name: AGENT-TEST-Org-AcmeWest-20260310
organizations.evidence: GET /api/members/{id} → HTTP 200 with empty body; not in /api/members/search

users.blastRadius: CRITICAL — referenced by .env ORG_USER_EMAIL; resolved as ORG_USER_DEFAULT in preflight [PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]; used by EVERY test in suites 006 (B2C-ORG-*) and 008 (B2C-MBR-*)

006-b2c-organization.blockedBy: Every test starts [PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT] → resolves to acme_store_maintainer_1@acme.com (DEAD). 100% sign-in failure expected.
006-b2c-organization.neededFor006MultiOrg: User must belong to ≥2 orgs. The .env MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL (ricreyacrouyi-3425@yopmail.com) was NOT probed; recommend orchestrator probe it before running, or substitute John Mitchell (USR-001) once re-linked to a second org.

008-b2c-members.blockedBy: Same ORG_USER_DEFAULT dependency. AcmeCorp org no longer exists, so 'Org Admin views members of AcmeCorp' tests have no org. No approval threshold or approver-role wiring exists on the surviving orgs (TechFlow/BuildRight) — pre-existing gap per Contoso Ltd. notes in brief.

007-b2c-lists-shared.verdict: LIKELY BLOCKED — needs sign-in via the same default user; check at runtime.

009-b2c-variations-configs.verdict: BLOCKED by upstream issue — Hat/T-shirt variation products were rebuilt with empty sections after the 2026-05-15 wipe. Out of scope of this seed (per brief: 'do not try to fix variation products from this profile').

010-b2c-bulk-ship-dashboard.verdict: PARTIALLY BLOCKED — needs both a multi-address org (TechFlow has full address book per test-data/addresses/techflow-org-addresses-state-20260423.json) AND a personal-account user with /account/addresses. The personal user requirement was not probed by this seed (.env USER_EMAIL=mutykovaelena@gmail.com is the candidate). Suite may run after .env-level remediation.

optionA_envRebind.summary: Repoint ORG_USER_DEFAULT alias + ORG_USER_EMAIL .env var at a surviving org-admin user (TechFlow/USR-006 Emily Johnson, password TestPass123!).
optionA_envRebind.cost: Low — single .env edit + aliases.json update + ~3 suite text replacements where TechFlow vs AcmeCorp names are asserted.
optionA_envRebind.risk: Suite 006 multi-org switching needs the chosen user in ≥2 orgs; Emily currently in TechFlow only. Either link her to BuildRight, or pick a different default.
optionA_envRebind.tradeoff: Re-enables suites 006 and 008 (sign-in unblocked). Suite 009 still blocked on variation products.

optionB_namedRestore.summary: Manually recreate AcmeCorp + AcmeWest + acme_store_maintainer_1 by NAME via Admin SPA, then re-link existing orphaned contacts (John, Sarah, Mike, Lisa, Hans) to the new AcmeCorp.
optionB_namedRestore.cost: Medium — 30–45 min via Admin SPA + Postman MCP for re-linking.
optionB_namedRestore.risk: Postman MCP cannot execute (per skill); requires Newman/Postman CLI or a one-shot helper script. The brief forbids custom scripts, so this must go via the canonical 'VC B2B Test Data — Orgs, Contacts, Users' collection (22 requests) modified to use the existing platform IDs rather than fresh GUIDs — a non-trivial collection edit.
optionB_namedRestore.tradeoff: Restores the named state the .env and suites were authored against. Cleanest long-term.

optionC_canonicalSeed.summary: Run the canonical /qa-seed-data b2b profile as-is. Creates AGENT-TEST-Org-AcmeCorp-20260519 (new GUID), AGENT-TEST-Org-TechFlow-20260519, fresh user hierarchy. Then update aliases.json + .env to point at the new entities.
optionC_canonicalSeed.cost: High — seed build + .env edits + aliases.json edits + CSV updates everywhere platform_ids appear.
optionC_canonicalSeed.risk: Diverges from the existing 2026-03-10 seed; touches every downstream test artifact.
optionC_canonicalSeed.tradeoff: Clean slate; matches skill contract; but invalidates all post-2026-03-10 seed-aware references.

recommendedRemediations.recommendation: Option A. Lowest cost, unblocks the two highest-value suites (006 + 008), preserves seed-history continuity. Discuss with user before executing — that decision is theirs per the brief's STOP-and-report rule.

credentialsSurfaced.policy: No plaintext passwords stored in this file. Per memory/feedback_agents_read_env_creds, agents read .env at runtime. Per-user password references:

passwordRefs.USR-001..014 seeded: TestPass123! — value in test-data/b2b/users.csv password column (gitignored?) — verify before commit

knownGaps_vs_006_008_010_needs: Suite 006: ORG_USER_DEFAULT user is DEAD — cannot sign in. No remediation attempted (would have exceeded seed contract scope).
Suite 008: ORG_USER_DEFAULT user is DEAD; AcmeCorp org is DEAD; no approval threshold/approver role configured on surviving orgs (pre-existing gap, also flagged in brief).
Suite 010: Personal-account user route /account/addresses not verified for any seeded account; standard .env USER_EMAIL is personal but membership in any org was not probed.
Variation products (Hat/T-shirt for suite 009): explicitly out of scope per brief — Suite 009 will remain blocked after any reseed.

noActionTaken.reason: Per brief: 'If a Postman request fails (4xx/5xx), STOP — do not retry blindly. Report the failure with the exact response payload so the user can decide whether to fix the collection or abort the run.' Equivalent here: the canonical b2b seed contract does not match the actual recovery need (named entities, not new AGENT-TEST-{date} entities). Executing it would consume budget without unblocking the b2c suites. The decision belongs to the user.
noActionTaken.whatWouldHaveBeenSeeded: If canonical b2b had been run anyway: 1 new organization AGENT-TEST-Org-AcmeCorp-20260519 (different GUID from dead ORG-001), 3 contacts (admin/buyer/viewer), 3 users, 1 custom role, addresses on contacts. None of these would resolve ORG_USER_DEFAULT to a live user, and none would re-establish the AcmeCorp name binding suites depend on.
auditTrail: Loaded BACK_URL + ADMIN credentials from config.js (no hardcoding) ✓
Probed 15 orgs + 13 contacts + 14 users via /api/members and /api/platform/security/users ✓
Searched /api/members/search (keyword AGENT-TEST, Organization) — 23 live AGENT-TEST orgs total ✓
Cross-referenced .env ORG_USER_DEFAULT binding via config loader ✓

downstreamTdReferences.note: Existing aliases in test-data/aliases.json that point at the dead entities (if any) should be flagged but not modified by this run. Recommend `npx tsx scripts/validate-td-refs.ts` after the user picks a remediation path.
csvFilesAffected: test-data/b2b/organizations.csv (ORG-001 row claims seeded=true with stale platform_id)
test-data/b2b/contacts.csv (CON-001..004 + CON-011 rows are alive but orphan from org POV)
test-data/b2b/users.csv (USR-015 row claims seeded=true but user is dead)

notes: Manifest written by qa-backend-expert per /qa-seed-data b2b dispatch. Successor seed run should overwrite this file in place per skill contract. Probe artifact retained in process memory only — no helper scripts left behind (per feedback_minimize_reports).
